case_title: PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY vs. THOPHY TRADING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-22-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-21-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-02-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-22-1996, CONTINUED TO MAR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BEFORE 3/12/96. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY SERVED OCT-27-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $105.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY
DECLARATION OF JAN CORWIN FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY $1,808.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,913.00, PRINCIPAL AMONUT OF $1808.00, INCLUDES $500.00 FOR TREBLE DAMAGES.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,070.00 AS TO DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDA'S INTERNATIONAL TRADING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT THOPHY TRADING COMPANY
